title: croton tetradenius
intro: Croton tetradenius, also known as the African croton or bush mango, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in essential oils and contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The seeds and leaves of the Croton tetradenius plant are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding digestion. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
